::: {#tbl-2d .unittable}
| [US](#us){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="United States"} [2D]{.tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="bidimensional"} units | [cz&sup2;](#cz2){.bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="square centizem"} | [cm&sup2;](#cm2){#squarecentimeter .bold .tool data-bs-toggle="tooltip" data-bs-title="square centimeter"} |
| ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| [0.9688]{.colorSqIn} [sq. inches](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_inch)                                                                           |  39.0625                                                                               |  6.25                                                                                    |
| [0.9688]{.colorSqIn} [sq. feet](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_foot)                                                                             |  5625                                                                                  |  900                                                                                     |
| [0.9688]{.colorSqIn} [sq. yards](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_yard)                                                                            |  50625                                                                                 |  8100                                                                                    |
| [0.9884]{.colorSqMi} [acres](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Acre)                                                                                       |  25 &times; 10^7^                                                                      |  4 &times; 10^7^                                                                         |
| [0.9884]{.colorSqMi} [sq. miles](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Square_mile)                                                                            |  16 &times; 10^10^                                                                     |  256 &times; 10^8^                                                                       |
:::
